text:
Speckled Squirrel (マダラリス, Madararisu) is a type of squirrel native to the Snakebeech Forest on Whale Island. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 1, Chapter 1 It is also only explicitly shown in the 1999 Anime adaptation.

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

A Speckled Squirrel informs Kite about Gon being attacked by an angry Foxbear. 

Trivia

Coincidentally or not, there is a species called speckled ground squirrel that uses alarm calls, although, in Japanese, the name of the real-life animal differs from the name of the Speckled Squirrel.

Anime and Manga Differences

The Speckled Squirrel is only mentioned in the manga, and the pilot. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 00 (1999) However, in the 1999 anime adaptation, it is also shown. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 1 (1999) In the 2011 anime adaptation, the species does not appear nor is mentioned. Hunter × Hunter - Episode 1 (2011) Hunter × Hunter - Episode 76 (2011)
